purpose: Primary relational datastore (RLS-isolated tenant data, sessions, audit, migrations).
isolation: Row-level security per tenant; non-superuser platform_app runtime role (ADR-ACT-0189); pgAdmin RLS-aware roles created by init-extra-databases.sh.
credentials: POSTGRES_USER/PASSWORD (superuser, migrations/seed only); platform_app + POSTGRES_APP_PASSWORD (runtime); pgAdmin RLS roles.
secretSource: .env.<env> (generated from env registry ADR-0072); production requires strong POSTGRES_APP_PASSWORD.
backupRestore: Local backup scripts (ADR-ACT-0228/0229); pg_dump/restore via db-shell; reset.ts no-op standalone.
upgradePolicy: Pinned minor (16.6); forward-only checksum-immutable migrations (never edit committed migrations).
personaAccess: Server-side only (BFF runtime pool); operators via pgAdmin clickthrough.
proof: test:platform-api db integration; migration checksum tests; healthcheck.

purpose: Session/cache store, rate-limit backend, event-bus/worker queues.
isolation: Tenant-keyed namespaces; AOF persistence (appendonly yes); Redis rate-limit provider (USF 3.5).
credentials: None local (no AUTH in dev); production should enable AUTH/TLS.
backupRestore: AOF file in redis-data volume; redis-flush-local for reset.

purpose: Analytics/columnar datastore for high-volume event and usage data.
isolation: No per-tenant partition isolation (clickthrough invariant) — global_only operator access; tenant scoping enforced at query/app layer.
backupRestore: clickhouse-data volume; native backup tooling not wired locally.
directLoginPolicy: No native login; forward-auth gates the /play console; bare /clickhouse returns 'Ok.' probe.
productionExposure: Apex via Caddy forward-auth (system-admin); HTTP/native ports internal.

purpose: S3-compatible object storage (uploads, attachments, exports).
isolation: Console grants all-bucket access — no per-tenant ACL in console (global_only); tenant prefix isolation at app layer.
credentials: MINIO_ROOT_USER/PASSWORD; OIDC client 'minio' (Keycloak, policy claim → consoleAdmin).
backupRestore: minio-data volume; mc mirror for offsite (not wired locally).
ssoMechanism: Keycloak OIDC (MINIO_IDENTITY_OPENID, policy claim mapper, ADR-0073)
directLoginPolicy: SSO via Keycloak after forward-auth; root creds for break-glass.
productionExposure: Apex via Caddy forward-auth; S3 API internal.

purpose: Local SMTP capture + web inbox for outbound email in non-prod.
isolation: NONE — single shared inbox, no tenant filtering (global_only; ADR-ACT-0233 revoked former tenant grant).
productionExposure: Global-only, not served per-tenant; real SMTP used in prod.

purpose: OTLP receiver; forwards spans to Tempo and processes telemetry (ADR-ACT-0284).
isolation: Telemetry pipeline; no tenant data store (spans must carry no secrets).
proof: E2E trace-by-id correlation; observability tracing tests (ADR-ACT-0284).

purpose: PostgreSQL web admin UI for operators (RLS-aware roles).
isolation: Raw SQL access; tenant scoping via user-settable GUCs is unsafe (global_only, ADR-0029); RLS-aware non-superuser roles.
credentials: PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL/PASSWORD; OIDC client secret PGADMIN_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET; RLS role passwords.
directLoginPolicy: SSO via Keycloak after forward-auth (no re-login); default creds break-glass.

purpose: Identity provider / OIDC broker; realm-based auth, UMA, brokered IdPs.
isolation: Realm 'platform'; admin console requires Keycloak's OWN admin auth (forward-auth additive); KC_HOSTNAME_STRICT pins issuer; hostname-v2 backchannel-dynamic.
credentials: KEYCLOAK_ADMIN/PASSWORD; KC_DB creds; per-client secrets (platform-api, provisioner, minio, grafana, pgadmin, sonar).
backupRestore: keycloak-postgres volume; realm via Terraform (keycloak provider).
upgradePolicy: Pinned (26.2); per-env start mode (start-dev dev/test, start staging/prod, ADR-ACT-0281).
ssoMechanism: Native Keycloak admin auth (it IS the IdP); OIDC issuer for all SSO services
directLoginPolicy: Realm endpoints public (login); admin console requires KC admin login behind forward-auth; users never see KC (invisible auth, ADR-ACT-0157).
personaAccess: system-admin global; tenant-admin on OWN slug only (tenant_scoped_safe).
proof: proof:auth-settings; OIDC login-sim BLOCKED on real IdPs; healthcheck; ADR-ACT-0157/0280/0281.

purpose: Dedicated Postgres backing the Keycloak realm store.
isolation: Dedicated DB for Keycloak only; never shares the platform postgres.

purpose: Static analysis / quality gate (absolute-zero gate; react-sonar project).
isolation: Shared instance, no per-tenant project isolation (global_only); own dedicated sonar-postgres survives per-env reset.
credentials: admin/admin default (provision-token.sh ADR-0072); SONAR_JDBC creds; optional OIDC.
liveness: system/status healthcheck (interval 30s, start_period 120s); ES bootstrap checks disabled.
backupRestore: sonarqube-data + sonar-postgres-data volumes; survives per-env down.
upgradePolicy: Pinned (25.9 Community); ADR-ACT-0289/0290; OIDC plugin opt-in (vaulttec v3.0.0).
ssoMechanism: Native managed auth (default, Option B ADR-ACT-0290); optional Keycloak OIDC via sonar-auth-oidc plugin (opt-in)
directLoginPolicy: Native managed auth behind forward-auth; OIDC SSO opt-in only; CI token analysis needs no plugin.
caddyRoute: apex /sonar/* (SONAR_WEB_CONTEXT=/sonar via sonar-bridge); no tenant path.
productionExposure: Apex via Caddy forward-auth (operator tooling); not a tenant service.
proof: make all / make release-confidence (Sonar gate once); service-clickthrough policy.

purpose: Dedicated Postgres for the shared SonarQube instance.
isolation: Dedicated to SonarQube; survives per-env down/reset.

purpose: Self-hosted error monitoring (errors-only; react-sentry project; multi-service stack: web, relay, snuba, kafka, consumers, workers).
isolation: Shared instance, no proven per-tenant org isolation (global_only); dedicated postgres/redis/clickhouse/kafka never share env resources.
backupRestore: sentry-data + dedicated postgres/clickhouse/kafka volumes; sentry-cleanup retention (90d default).
ssoMechanism: Native Sentry auth (no platform SSO wired); forward-auth gate only
directLoginPolicy: Native Sentry login behind forward-auth; FORCE_SCRIPT_NAME=/sentry.
caddyRoute: apex /sentry/* (via sentry-bridge); no tenant path (dead grant removed).
productionExposure: Global-only operator tooling; platform-api sends events to sentry-relay over sentry-bridge.

purpose: Vault-compatible central runtime secrets manager (Tier-1 kernel, behind SecretStorePort).
isolation: Secrets store; never tenant-reachable; not exposed via forward-auth; platform reads/writes server-side via SecretStorePort. Postgres store remains durable default.
secretSource: .env (dev root token); production requires sealed HA auto-unseal with externalised creds.
backupRestore: Dev mode in-memory (ephemeral); production requires durable sealed backend.
directLoginPolicy: NOT_EXPOSED — direct port only (OPENBAO_PORT); never linked in UI.
personaAccess: Operators directly on OPENBAO_PORT; platform server-side via SecretStorePort.
productionExposure: Not exposed via Caddy; dev local-only.

purpose: Composed search provider (behind ProviderReadinessProbe; Postgres FTS is durable default).
isolation: Per-environment; tenant-scoped indexes at app layer; readiness live-proven via ProviderReadinessProbe.
backupRestore: Meili dumps; rebuildable from source-of-truth Postgres.
upgradePolicy: Pinned (v1.10); ADR-0071/ADR-ACT-0271; optional provider (Postgres FTS ADR-0060 default).

purpose: Composed metrics backend (observability provider; built-in foundation ADR-0062 is default).
isolation: Per-environment; env labels mandatory; no secrets in labels/samples.

purpose: Distributed trace backend (in standard observability stack AND ADR-0071 provider group).
isolation: Trace store; per-env; spans must carry no secrets.

purpose: Composed alert routing backend (observability provider group).
isolation: Per-environment alert routing; no tenant data.
secretSource: Receiver creds via env when configured.

purpose: Log aggregation backend; powers admin log search API (ADR-0035/ADR-ACT-0194).
isolation: Per-env (each compose project has own loki:3100); all tenants' logs visible to operators (global via Grafana).
backupRestore: loki-data filesystem; prod should use S3/MinIO storage.
directLoginPolicy: No login; surfaced via Grafana + admin log search.
personaAccess: Operators via Grafana / admin log search.
proof: admin log-search tests; observability logging coverage (ADR-ACT-0284); healthcheck.

purpose: Observability dashboards over Loki/Tempo/Prometheus.
isolation: Platform log/metric/trace search — all tenants' data visible (global_only).
ssoMechanism: Keycloak generic OAuth (opt-in COMPOSE_SSO_ENABLED; roles→Admin/GrafanaAdmin; auto-login)
caddyRoute: apex /grafana/* (ROOT_URL from APP_BASE_URL); no tenant path.
productionExposure: Apex via Caddy forward-auth; edge via Cloudflare.
proof: service-clickthrough policy; SSO ADR-ACT-0285 Phase 6; healthcheck.

purpose: Grafana Alloy log shipper — discovers env containers via Docker socket, parses Pino JSON, forwards to Loki.
isolation: Per-env container discovery via COMPOSE_PROJECT_FILTER regex on compose project label.

purpose: Internal reverse proxy + SPA server (react-app); forward-auth gateway for all operator clickthroughs; per-tenant FQDN routing.
isolation: forward_auth to platform-api /internal/auth/forward (CADDY_INTERNAL_SECRET, ADR-0031); resource sets derived from service-clickthrough.ts; Caddyfile reconciled by test.
upgradePolicy: Caddy 2 alpine; Caddyfile + Caddyfile.external governed by service-clickthrough.test.ts.
ssoMechanism: Delegates to platform-api forward-auth (session cookie → decideServiceAccess)
personaAccess: All personas pass through; per-route forward-auth decides.
caddyRoute: apex + tenant wildcard vhosts; external-caddy routes by Host (staging→:82, prod→:83).
productionExposure: Edge ingress (behind Cloudflare Flexible SSL); external-caddy on host :80.
proof: service-clickthrough.test.ts (parses Caddyfile); local Caddy routing proof (extractSlugFromHost); healthcheck.

purpose: Edge CDN + TLS termination (Flexible SSL) + DNS for aldous.info and tenant subdomains.
isolation: Edge layer; TLS terminated at edge, HTTP to origin; KC_PROXY_HEADERS=xforwarded trusts X-Forwarded-*.
credentials: Cloudflare account (out of repo); API tokens via secrets policy if automated.
secretSource: Out-of-repo secret manager / .env.* (never hardcoded in committed .tfvars).
caddyRoute: n/a (sits in front of Caddy); caches theme URL (auth-visual-consistency gotcha).
productionExposure: Public edge — the production ingress front door.
proof: make e2e-prod live smoke; prod auth cookie/denial logging (ADR-ACT-0278).

purpose: AWS service emulation (s3, sqs, sns, secretsmanager) for dev/test.
isolation: Cloud mock, no tenant scope; mounts Docker socket (local-dev exception, never CI/shared hosts).
directLoginPolicy: No login; forward-auth gates; devOnly (link locked in production, forbiddenInProduction).
caddyRoute: apex /localstack/* (dev only); no tenant path; NOT linked in production.
productionExposure: NOT exposed in production (devOnly; apex link locked).

purpose: Deterministic external HTTP API mocking for adapter dev and E2E.
isolation: Dev-only mock; deliberately NOT routed through forward-auth; never linked in UI; mappings safe fixtures only (no real payloads/secrets).
secretSource: n/a (no secrets in mappings — committed rule).
directLoginPolicy: NOT_EXPOSED — direct port only (WIREMOCK_PORT); no Caddy route.
productionExposure: Not exposed (direct-port only, not via Caddy).

purpose: Non-production upstream OIDC IdP fixture (node-oidc-provider); Keycloak brokers it as mock-google/mock-azure/mock-apple.
isolation: Per-env (one instance per project; single issuer per instance); never started silently in staging/prod; guarded by AUTH_PROVIDER_MODE=mock + ALLOW_MOCK_IDP_IN_PROD_UNTIL_REAL_PROVIDERS.
upgradePolicy: Local build; pre-real-provider bootstrap only; OIDC login-sim BLOCKED on real IdPs (ADR-ACT-0220).
ssoMechanism: IS an OIDC provider (real auth-code flow, signed ID tokens) brokered by Keycloak
directLoginPolicy: Login simulation fixture; not an operator UI clickthrough.
caddyRoute: Published per-env host port (MOCK_OIDC_PUBLIC_URL); browser uses public issuer, Keycloak uses internal http://mock-oidc:8080.
productionExposure: Must NEVER run silently in prod; explicit guarded bootstrap only (BFF startup loudly logs).
proof: ADR-ACT-0157; mock-identity.md; healthcheck; OIDC login-sim blocked memory.
